catalogCollection.title: Dairy Automation Systems
catalogCollection.description: Advanced solutions for modernizing dairy operations, reducing staff workload, and ensuring animal health through automated monitoring and collection.

products.title: AutoMilk Collector
products.description: An automated milk collection system that gently and efficiently milks cows while tracking yield data.

products.title: CowCam Tracker
products.description: A smart video surveillance system powered by AI to monitor cow health, condition, and movement in real-time.

products.title: DairyClean Pro
products.description: An automated waste removal system that keeps barns hygienic, protecting animals from dangerous or unsanitary environments.

catalogCollection.title: Poultry Management
catalogCollection.description: Fully automated systems designed to streamline poultry farming, from egg collection to environmental maintenance.

products.title: EggGatherBot
products.description: A fully automated, gentle egg collection conveyor that drastically reduces manual labor.

products.title: ShellShine Auto-Cleaner
products.description: An automated washing and sanitization unit integrated directly into the collection line.

products.title: CluckFeeder Auto
products.description: A programmable, automated feeding and watering system that ensures precise nutrition for poultry flocks.

catalogCollection.title: General Livestock Care
catalogCollection.description: Automated feeding and waste cleaning systems adaptable for various livestock to facilitate the work process for farm staff.

products.title: OmniFeeder System
products.description: Automated feeding stations that dispense customized feed mixes based on livestock needs.

products.title: WasteAway Conveyor
products.description: A low-maintenance, automated animal waste cleaning system that integrates into existing barn structures.

products.title: SafePen Upgrades
products.description: Animal-safe, structurally reinforced enclosure upgrades designed to prevent accidental harm and improve animal welfare.

catalogCollection.title: Crop Care & Agronomy
catalogCollection.description: Smart systems for monitoring and maintaining optimal crop health, improving agronomic culture care, and increasing farm income.

products.title: AquaDrop Irrigator
products.description: An automated, green-energy-powered watering system that adjusts output based on real-time weather and soil data.

products.title: SoilSense Probes
products.description: Deep-earth sensors that provide automated, real-time soil quality and moisture testing.

products.title: PestShield Drone
products.description: An automated aerial pest control system that safely monitors and deters pests without heavy chemical reliance.

catalogCollection.title: Automated Harvesting
catalogCollection.description: Contemporary structural machinery to automate the harvesting of crops, accelerating operations and replacing manual field labor.

products.title: AutoHarvester X1
products.description: A high-efficiency, automated combine system for rapid grain and staple crop harvesting.

products.title: GentlePick Arm
products.description: A robotic arm attachment designed for the automated, bruise-free harvesting of delicate fruits and vegetables.

products.title: CropSort Conveyor
products.description: An automated field-side sorting system that grades and cleans crops immediately after harvesting.

catalogCollection.title: Wind Energy Infrastructure
catalogCollection.description: FerBromHata's core green energy solutions, utilizing wind power to sustainably run farm automation equipment.

products.title: AeroFarm Turbine
products.description: A highly efficient wind turbine specifically scaled and designed to power farmstead operations.

products.title: BreezeStore Battery Hub
products.description: High-capacity energy storage units to bank wind power for uninterrupted automated farming.

products.title: WindSync Controller
products.description: A smart grid management tool that distributes wind energy directly to active automated machinery.

catalogCollection.title: Solar Power Systems
catalogCollection.description: Alternative green energy solutions utilizing solar panels to power remote field equipment and sensors.

products.title: SunField Panels
products.description: Durable, weather-resistant solar panels optimized for agricultural environments and field installations.

products.title: SolarTrak Mounts
products.description: Automated mounts that follow the sun's trajectory to maximize energy capture for field operations.

products.title: FieldCharge Station
products.description: Solar-powered docking hubs where automated rovers and drones can recharge without returning to the main farmstead.

catalogCollection.title: Control Software Subscriptions
catalogCollection.description: The central software systems required to control, monitor, and manage all FerBromHata automated functions across the farm.

products.title: FerBrom OS - Basic Rate
products.description: An entry-level subscription for managing single-system automation (e.g., just poultry or just irrigation).

products.title: FerBrom OS - Advanced Rate
products.description: A comprehensive control system for managing multi-faceted farm automation with real-time video and data analytics.

products.title: FerBrom OS - Enterprise Rate
products.description: Full-scale software for large or multi-location farms, featuring international market compliance and advanced remote control.

catalogCollection.title: Structural Farm Upgrades
catalogCollection.description: Legacy and modern construction components designed to upgrade and maintain farmsteads without the need for full reconstruction.

products.title: RetroFit Trusses
products.description: Modernized, heavy-duty trusses designed to support new automated equipment while fitting into existing agricultural machinery and barns.

products.title: EcoInsulate Panels
products.description: Easy-to-install structural panels that upgrade the thermal efficiency of older farm buildings to green era standards.

products.title: SmartVent System
products.description: An automated climate control ventilation system easily retrofitted into traditional livestock housing.

catalogCollection.title: Experimental UCD Robotics
catalogCollection.description: Cutting-edge, experimental machine solutions developed in partnership with the University College Dublin Robotics and Engineering Department.

products.title: UCD-Rover Beta
products.description: An experimental, machine-learning-driven field rover that scouts crops and adapts to new terrain.

products.title: EduBot Harvester
products.description: An academic prototype harvesting arm that uses advanced vision to learn and identify different crop ripeness levels.

products.title: GreenGrid Simulator
products.description: An advanced software planning tool that helps farms simulate the most efficient layout for wind and solar integration before installation.
